user.title: Biamp Tesira
user.description: How would you like to find your Tesira DSP?

manual.title: Connect to Tesira
manual.description: Enter the IP address and protocol. SSH is recommended; enable SSH or Telnet in Tesira Composer or the device web UI.

discovery.title: Discovered Tesira devices
discovery.description: Select a device and confirm the connection settings.

entities_menu.title: Set up entities
entities_menu.description:
**{device_name}** is connected.

Blocks found on the device: {aliases}

Currently configured: {block_count} block entity(ies), {control_point_count} imported control point(s).

You can add entities now or finish and configure them later under integration options.

import.title: Import control points
import.description: Paste a CSV or JSON export from your Tesira layout. Leave blank to skip.

add_block.title: Add block entity
add_block.description: Choose the entity type and Tesira block to control.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. Check the IP, protocol, port, and that SSH or Telnet is enabled on the Tesira.
error.discovery_failed: No Tesira devices found on the network. Try entering the IP address manually.

init.title: Biamp Tesira options
init.description:
Poll every {poll_interval} s · Live updates every {subscription_interval} ms

{block_count} block entity(ies) · {control_point_count} imported control point(s)

timing.title: Polling and live updates
timing.description: How often Home Assistant refreshes entity state. Live updates use TTP subscriptions where supported.

import_control_points.title: Import control points
import_control_points.description: Replace the current import ({control_point_count} control point(s)) with CSV or JSON from your Tesira layout.

add_block.title: Add block entity
add_block.description: Map a Tesira block to a new Home Assistant entity.
